notes: Analyze page: cards now show small numbered chips for each of your selected themes — hover to see the theme name.
New Theme sort option in the deck stacks — groups cards by theme membership so the synergy picks rise to the top.
Deck grid view: new Stacks layout option — cards overlap in vertical columns, Moxfield-style.
Deck grid view: new Group selector — group cards by Type, Mana Value, Color, Color Identity, Rarity, Role, or No Grouping.
New curve play area on the Analyze page — see your deck laid out by CMC and type with role-colored stripes.
Click a CMC column in the play area to jump to the Tempo tab focused on that mana value.
Collapse the play area or expand the lands row anytime — your preference is remembered.
New Analyze page — paste a decklist, pick a saved deck, or generate a fresh one, then inspect roles, mana, curve, bracket, and combos in one place.
Added Analyze to the navbar between Generate and Lists.
Generated decks and saved lists both have an Analyze button that opens the full-width analyzer.
Mobile improvements for the new playtest page
The app has a name now - ManaFoundry!
Take your new deck out for a spin with the new playtest feature!
Made 'EDHRec Rank' available under the 'show' menu
Majorly improved the mobile experice across many parts of the app (I see you mobile users)
Playtest area — drag cards onto a free-position battlefield, tap, add counters, mulligan, scry/mill/surveil, search library, spawn tokens. Open from any deck via the new Playtest button.
Hotkeys in playtest: D draw, U untap all, S shuffle, M mulligan, 1-7 phases, Ctrl+Z undo.
Sol Ring and Arcane Signet are now auto-included in every legal deck (respects bans, budget, and collection-only mode)
New land count target control in the deck optimizer — bump it up or down to match how mana-hungry you want the deck
Random commander with a color filter now prefers an exact color identity match (e.g. GB filter picks GB commanders, not GBW or GBU)
EA Features toggle moved to the version/patch notes popover so it's available from anywhere
Cleaner alignment for combo cards in the combo panel
Fixed deck generator not respecting your land count
Collection-only decks no longer sneak in combo pieces you don't own
Moved the Modify Deck button next to the view toggle for easier access
Fixed text editor showing false changes for double-faced cards on freshly generated decks
Owned Cards Skip Rarity feature
Greatly rebalanced the way the deck generator handles combos, synergy combos should show up with greater frequency than simply popular combos now
Category (ramp/card advantage etc) number recommendations are now based on averge decks for your commander
Two sided cards with '//' in their name should import correctly now
Channel lands and MDFC lands should show up more frequently when generating decks
Inclusion score updated to be more accurrate to our internal ranking system
Fixed deck generator producing too few lands when using a large must-include list
Cards from include lists are now properly protected during deck balancing
Deck generator less likely to leave orphaned combo pieces in the final result
Deck score visible in the Statistics column as an EA feature
Improved UI when importing decks or lists
Statistics panel now shows how many cards you own from the current deck
Easily see the number of cards from your collection you own in the shown deck
